import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_lcs_length_diagonal_match():
    # Bug: on character match, uses dp[i-1, j] + 1 instead of dp[i-1, j-1] + 1
    # This causes incorrect LCS length calculation by reading wrong DP cell
    assert source.lcs_length('ABCBDAB', 'BDCAB') == 2
